generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired military spouse, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Dr. Linda Carter, a security expert at the Wilson Institute, recently pointed out that cutting back on commitments could leave us vulnerable. 'Shared defense isn't just about us writing checks—it's about having partners who have our back when it counts,' she said. My neighbor's son is serving overseas right now, and I know he'd want us to stand firm with our allies. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
